trigger_question_examples: What did the vomit look like?
Have you vomited any blood or dark material?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It looked like wet coffee grounds — dark brown, almost black, grainy stuff.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Black, tarry, foul-smelling stools passed over the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: What have your bowel motions looked like?
Have your stools been black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — black, sticky and tarry, and they smell terrible. It's happened twice in the last few hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-syncope and lightheadedness on standing, with generalised weakness
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint or dizzy, especially when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stood up from the toilet I nearly blacked out and had to grab the wall. I feel really weak and dizzy even lying here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Carer reports the patient looks pale/grey, sweaty and clammy
trigger_question_examples: How does he look to you right now — colour, sweating?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's gone really pale, almost grey, and he's sweaty and clammy all over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: 12-hour history of burning epigastric pain preceding the bleeding
trigger_question_examples: Did you have any tummy pain before this started?
Where and what did the pain feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, about half a day ago I got a burning, gnawing pain high in my tummy, under the breastbone, before all this started.

trigger_question_examples: How much alcohol do you drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I drink a fair bit, most days, and have for years.

trigger_question_examples: Do you take any anti-inflammatory tablets like ibuprofen or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just some ibuprofen from the chemist now and then for aches — nothing regular.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any blood-thinner or anti-clotting medication
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood thinners, like warfarin, apixaban or aspirin?
Do you take anything to prevent clots or thin your blood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like warfarin or blood thinners.
